case_title: MOSSER, NEVEO vs. LYNCH, TIMOTHY et al

docket_entries.description: UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, TIMOTHY DOES 1 TO 4 SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT LYNCH, TIMOTHY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 350 TURK ST #T-603, LEASE FORFEITED, NOTATION DONE ON ORIGINAL INSTRUMENT- CRC 522
REQUEST FOR DEFAULT REJECTED, NOTICE MAILED,
REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, TIMOTHY
DECLARATION GIVING PROPERTY MANAGER AUTHORITY TO SUE ON OWNERS BEHALF FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF MOSSER, NEVEO SERVED FEB-23-1996, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT LYNCH, TIMOTHY
